rationale: The implementation faithfully maps the frozen v12 Task 4a specifications to code. It provides exactly the committed normative lists (WEAVERS, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS, LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS) fully deep-frozen with units. The shared module-load classifier and relative-specifier resolver are exactly correctly integrated into `util.mjs` and handle D33's literal/relative policies accurately without ASTs or third-party dependencies. Physical containment checks (D21) correctly avoid following symlinked ancestors via manual component lstats. The `git.mjs` implementation correctly bounds arguments to safe literal shapes without shells, issues `introduced-by` exactly as demanded, correctly throws on malformed out, and warns on empty out. The `code.mjs` code weaver exactly fulfills the cross-4-endpoint fallback semantics, using correct file- and symbol-level threading with unrepresentable/dedup logic accurately applied. Tests rigorously verify edge cases, failures, and equality conditions. No scope creep is detected.
